name: Hotel Renaissance Aurangabad
description: A premium full-service hotel offering luxurious rooms, multi-cuisine dining, swimming pool, and world-class amenities in the heart of the city.

name: Panchakki Garden Stay
description: Experience heritage hospitality near the iconic Panchakki water-mill. Peaceful, well-maintained rooms with garden views.

name: Budget Inn CSN
description: Clean, affordable rooms with all essential amenities. Ideal for solo travelers and backpackers.

name: Grishneshwar Pilgrim Lodge
description: Simple and peaceful stay near Grishneshwar Jyotirlinga temple. Ideal for pilgrims and heritage tourists.

name: Standard Comfort Rooms
description: Comfortable standard rooms with 24-hour room service, free Wi-Fi, and breakfast included.
